text:
Martin Wilke wrote:
> any news here?
> 

I have tried to investigate futher.

It seems that ECAP needs ICAP support enabled but doesn't impies it. 
WITHOUT_ICAP & WITH_ECAP results in errors on port build.

Is ICAP really needed for ECAP to work?

-- 
Sphinx of black quartz judge my vow.
